title: The Potting Shed Wall Mounted Garden Thermometer | Waterproof Outdoor Temperature Gauge | Greenhouse Patio Thermometer ~ 40cm - Colour Varies One Supplied
features: OUTDOOR THERMOMETER | Easily check the temperature in your garden, greenhouse or conservatory with our potting shed thermometer. It features large, easy-to-read Fahrenheit and Celsius scales, helping you monitor and maintain the ideal conditions for your plants and flowers

GARDEN DECOR | Designed for outdoor use, this thermometer is waterproof and sturdy. it adds a decorative touch to any garden setting while delivering reliable performance - Note: Colour varies, one thermometer is supplied per order
IDEAL GIFT FOR GARDENERS | This charming and practical thermometer makes a perfect gift for gardening enthusiasts, adding both style and function to their outdoor space

IDEAL FOR SENSITIVE PLANTS | Keep your plants safe from extreme temperatures, ensuring their health and growth with the potting shed thermometer. Perfect for gardeners with delicate plants that need specific temperature ranges

DIMENSIONS | Measuring 40cm in length, this thermometer is designed for easy hanging. Its straightforward installation means you can start monitoring temperatures quickly and effortlessly. Colour varies (one supplied)
